items.title: Sources: United plan formal Carrick manager talks
items.summary: Manchester United are planning talks with Michael Carrick about continuing as head coach next season, sources have told ESPN.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Raducanu to return from illness in Strasbourg
items.summary: Emma Raducanu, who has not played a tournament since Indian Wells in March, will make her comeback from illness at the Internationaux de Strasbourg next week.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Brian Burns: I'm kinda looking at this as my defense
items.summary: Giants edge rusher Brian Burns said in mid-April that he did not want to play "this season or any other season" without Dexter Lawrence, but that didn't stop the team from tradi...
